task_summary: ST7: CommonJS-safe supertest harness (test-harness.ts) + two executed HTTP integration test groups — proxy-hop request.ip assertion and helmet baseline header assertions — for the SFUS API.
assumptions: No documentation files require updating: the plan's 'Documentation Impact: none' guidance is confirmed by diff analysis. All changed files are test infrastructure (test-harness.ts, http.integration.test.ts, package.json devDependencies, pnpm-lock.yaml). The HTTP integration tests run under the regular vitest suite already covered by docs/development/testing.md section 1. The createTestApp harness is fully documented in-code with JSDoc. No new test commands, env variables, or gated test modes were introduced.
Documentation commit hash is the tester's final commit (fbd551d) since no documentation files were modified.
acceptance_criteria: AC1 (proxy-hop): Executed test asserts request.ip equals the injected X-Forwarded-For client address on a real Express HTTP response — no mocking — PASSED
AC2 (helmet): Executed tests assert X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff present, Strict-Transport-Security absent, Content-Security-Policy absent on real HTTP responses — PASSED
AC3 (harness): test-harness.ts is a reusable exported helper (createTestApp), CommonJS-safe (no import.meta), and API tsc build passes — PASSED
all_modified_files: apps/api/src/test-harness.ts — new shared harness helper (createTestApp) exported for ST8/ST9 reuse
apps/api/src/http.integration.test.ts — new HTTP integration test file with proxy-hop and helmet test groups
apps/api/package.json — added supertest ^7.2.2, @types/supertest ^7.2.0, express ^5.2.1 as API devDependencies
plan_context: ST7 Documentation Impact: none (test infrastructure; no behavior change) — confirmed by actual diff review
Architecture reference: docs/architecture/milestone-1-foundation-decisions.md §Security — trust proxy and HSTS decisions documented there remain accurate
No production routes changed; all diff is test-only files
convention_guidance: docs/README.md is the documentation routing table — consulted before editing
docs/development/testing.md covers test commands — HTTP integration tests run under existing vitest suite (section 1), no new section warranted
One fact, one home — createTestApp is documented inline in test-harness.ts with full JSDoc, not duplicated in external docs
